creator: warlock@phouka.net
text:
Created attachment 235742
poudriere build log

When compiling on my RPI4 (arm64) but not on any of my amd64 boxes, I'm seeing these three undefined symbol errors;

ld: error: undefined symbol: xf86EnableIO
ld: error: undefined symbol: xf86DisableIO
ld: error: undefined symbol: xf86OSInitVidMem

These started with the cutover from -1.20.14 to -21.1.4.
